name: io.github.ringosystems/tractorbeeam-mcp
description: Independent MCP server for Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 (VB365): read-only review by default, plus an opt-in, confirm-gated, audited action/restore tier.

environmentVariables.name: VB365_HOST
environmentVariables.description: IP or hostname of the VB365 (Veeam Backup Server) host

environmentVariables.name: VB365_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: VB365 account used to obtain a REST API token (DOMAIN\\user, .\\localuser, or user@domain)
